meta.title: Port d'Eivissa — Ibiza Harbour, Balearic Islands
meta.description: Complete guide to Ibiza Harbour: yacht marina, waterfront promenade, Dalt Vila, Formentera ferries, restaurants and nightlife.

hero.title: Port d'Eivissa
hero.subtitle: The iconic harbour of Ibiza, heart of the Mediterranean

about.title: Discover the Harbour
about.description: Located in the heart of Ibiza Town in Spain's Balearic Islands, Ibiza Harbour (Port d'Eivissa) is far more than a playground for luxury yachts — it's the perfect hub where ancient history meets vibrant Mediterranean life. Whether you're seeking authentic tapas, sunset boat cruises, or the UNESCO World Heritage old town, this is your ideal starting point.

disclaimer.title: About This Site
disclaimer.content: This website is an independent third-party travel information site created to provide objective guidance for visiting the harbour and its surrounding area. The content is compiled from public sources, including official tourism bodies, local tourism authorities and Wikipedia, and is supplemented with basic public information from Google Maps.

highlights.title: Highlights
items: Luxury yacht marina and waterfront promenade
UNESCO World Heritage Dalt Vila old town backdrop
Gateway to Formentera island day trips
Vibrant dining, shopping and nightlife scene
24/7 free public access with scenic Mediterranean views
Cruise ship port with shops, bars and restaurants

items.title: Marina Promenade (Marina Port Ibiza)
items.description: One of the most luxurious areas of Ibiza. Stroll along the waterfront admiring stunning superyachts while enjoying high-end boutiques, open-air cafés, and sunset cocktails. Best visited at golden hour when the light paints the sea and white hulls in gold.

items.title: Dalt Vila — UNESCO World Heritage Old Town
items.description: The harbour's magnificent backdrop is the ancient Dalt Vila. Pass through the grand Portal de ses Taules — with its massive stone arch and drawbridge — to enter a medieval labyrinth of cobblestone streets. Climb to the Cathedral of Santa Maria for panoramic views of the entire harbour and Mediterranean.

items.title: Corsair Monument
items.description: On the harbour promenade stands the world's only monument honouring corsairs — officially licensed pirates. In the 16th century, locals formed armed fleets to defend the island against maritime threats. This obelisk commemorates those who protected Ibiza.

items.title: Boat Trips & Island Hopping
items.description: Ibiza Harbour is a major maritime hub. Book catamaran sunset cruises, charter private yachts, or take the ferry to Formentera — the 'Caribbean of the Mediterranean' — just a short boat ride away, perfect for a day trip.

reviews.title: Real Visitor Reviews
reviews.declaration: Ratings and reviews from Google Maps (last updated: 2026). We show only a selection of verified high-rated reviews. To see all complete and most recent reviews, click the link below.
reviews.seeAll: See all reviews on Google Maps

items.name: María García López
items.text: Amazing harbour! The views of Dalt Vila from the waterfront are spectacular. Perfect for evening walks and sunset watching — the restaurants along the promenade serve excellent paella.

items.name: Carlos Ruiz Martín
items.text: Best spot in Ibiza for a sunset stroll. The superyachts are incredible to see up close. We took the ferry to Formentera from here — unforgettable day trip.

items.name: Sophie Dubois
items.text: Beautiful marina with stunning views. The old town rising behind the harbour creates a magical atmosphere. Great selection of bars and cafés.

items.name: Thomas Weber
items.text: Visited during winter and still impressive. Much quieter than summer. The walk up to Dalt Vila from the harbour is a must-do — free parking was easy to find off-season.

items.name: 陳美玲
items.text: The harbour is the heart of Ibiza. We spent three evenings here enjoying different restaurants. The Corsair Monument is fascinating — a unique piece of history.

items.name: James Mitchell
items.text: Great harbour area with plenty to see and do. Booked a sunset catamaran cruise from here — highlight of our holiday. Parking is tough in summer though.

items.name: Ana Fernández
items.text: One of the most beautiful harbours in the Mediterranean. The contrast between modern yachts and the ancient walled city is incredible. A must-visit!

items.name: Pierre Lefèvre
items.text: Magical place especially at sunset. The night markets near the old town walls are wonderful for unique souvenirs. Bohemian atmosphere at its best.

address.label: Address
address.value: Avinguda de Santa Eulària des Riu, 17, 07800 Eivissa, Illes Balears, Spain

hours.label: Opening Hours
hours.value: Open 24 hours — Public access area. Commercial venues and restaurants typically open from morning until late night.

transport.label: Getting There
transport.value: From Ibiza Airport (IBZ): ~10-15 min by taxi (~€17) or ~30 min by public bus.

parking.label: Parking
parking.value: Free and paid parking available. Very limited in peak season (June–September) — public transport or taxi recommended.

accessibility.label: Accessibility
accessibility.value: Wheelchair accessible entrance and parking. NFC mobile payment, credit and debit cards accepted.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how ibzharbour.com collects, uses, and protects your personal information when you visit our website. We are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring a safe browsing experience.

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect minimal data necessary to provide our services. This may include: browsing data (IP address, browser type, pages visited), cookies and similar technologies, and any information you voluntarily provide via contact forms or email. When you visit our site, we may also receive general geographic information based on your IP address to provide relevant content.

sections.title: How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use collected information to: improve website content and user experience, analyse site traffic and usage patterns, respond to inquiries, and comply with legal obligations. We may use aggregated, anonymised data for statistical purposes to understand how visitors use our site.

sections.title: Third-Party Services
sections.content: Our website may use third-party services such as Google Maps (for embedded maps and location data), Google Analytics (for traffic analysis), and Unsplash (for photography). Additionally, we may display Google AdSense advertisements. These services have their own privacy policies and may collect data according to their terms.

sections.title: Cookies and Tracking Technologies
sections.content: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience. Essential cookies are required for basic site functionality. Analytics cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website. Marketing cookies may be used to display relevant advertisements. You can manage your cookie preferences through our Cookie Settings page.

sections.title: Your Rights
sections.content: Under GDPR and applicable regulations, you have the right to: access your personal data, request correction or deletion, object to processing, and lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority. You also have the right to withdraw consent at any time where processing is based on consent.

sections.title: Data Security
sections.content: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the Internet or electronic storage is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

sections.title: Children's Privacy
sections.content: Our website is not intended for children under 16 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe we have inadvertently collected such information, please contact us immediately so we can take appropriate action.

sections.title: Changes to This Policy
sections.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or legal requirements. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.

privacy.contactContent: If you have any questions or concerns regarding this Privacy Policy, please contact us at: claritleonelmnicol@gmail.com

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By accessing and using ibzharbour.com, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. Please read these terms carefully before using our website. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please do not use our site.

sections.title: Use of Content
sections.content: All content on this site is provided for informational purposes only. We are an independent third-party tourism information site and are not affiliated with Ibiza Harbour management, any government entity, or commercial operator. The information provided should not be considered as professional advice for any specific situation.

sections.title: Accuracy of Information
sections.content: We strive to keep information accurate and up-to-date, but cannot guarantee completeness or accuracy. Opening hours, prices, and conditions may change without notice. Always verify critical details with official sources before your visit. We recommend contacting the relevant authorities or establishments directly for the most current information.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
sections.content: Website design and original content are protected by copyright. Photographs are sourced from Unsplash under their licence terms or provided by users. Google Maps data is used under Google's Terms of Service. Any reproduction, distribution, or use of our content without explicit permission is prohibited.

sections.title: External Links
sections.content: Our website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the content, accuracy, or practices of any linked websites. The inclusion of external links does not imply endorsement of the linked sites or their content. Users should review the terms and privacy policies of any third-party sites they visit.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: This website is provided 'as is' without warranties. We are not liable for any damages arising from the use of information on this site, including but not limited to travel decisions based on our content. This includes direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages. Users assume full responsibility for their use of the information provided.

sections.title: User Conduct
sections.content: By using this website, you agree not to: use the site for any unlawful purpose, attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of the site, interfere with the site's operation, or transmit any harmful code. We reserve the right to terminate access for users who violate these terms.

sections.title: Governing Law
sections.content: These Terms of Service shall be governed by and construed in accordance with applicable laws. Any disputes arising from the use of this website shall be resolved through appropriate legal channels. If any provision of these terms is found to be unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall continue in effect.

terms.contactContent: For questions about these terms, contact: claritleonelmnicol@gmail.com
